mapper.select: SELECT * FROM category WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM category WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM category WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category (parent_id, name, icon, sort_order, status) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{name}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder}, #{status})
mapper.update:
UPDATE category
name = #{name}, parent_id = #{parentId}, icon = #{icon}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE category SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
